Class PropertyFacade<D,T>

java.lang.Object
iu.type.ElementBase
iu.type.PropertyFacade<D,T>
Type Parameters:
D - declaring type
T - property type
All Implemented Interfaces:
edu.iu.type.IuAnnotatedElement, edu.iu.type.IuAttribute<D,T>, edu.iu.type.IuDeclaredElement<D>, edu.iu.type.IuNamedElement<D>, edu.iu.type.IuProperty<D,T>, DeclaredAttribute<D,T>
final class PropertyFacade<D,T> extends ElementBase implements edu.iu.type.IuProperty<D,T>, DeclaredAttribute<D,T>
Facade implementation of IuProperty.

  • Constructor Details

    • PropertyFacade

      PropertyFacade(PropertyDescriptor propertyDescriptor, TypeTemplate<?,T> typeTemplate, TypeTemplate<?,D> declaringTypeTemplate)
      Facade constructor.
      Parameters:
      propertyDescriptor - property descriptor
      typeTemplate - fully realized TypeTemplate for a generic type whose erasure is the property type
      declaringTypeTemplate - fully realized TypeTemplate for a generic type whose erasure declared the property
